name: HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR tool
description: For HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in training and paperwork completion. We streamline onboarding instead of manual processes.
target_audience: HR administrators in small to medium-sized marketing agencies using BambooHR
problem_solved: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in training and paperwork completion.
features: HR admin alerts for onboarding status

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient onboarding processes leading to delays in training and paperwork completion.
